ogTitle: Barragga Bay vs Barren Grounds: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Barragga Bay and Barren Grounds.
heading: Barragga Bay vs Barren Grounds — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Barragga Bay, New South Wales and Barren Grounds, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Barragga Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Barren Grounds (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Barragga Bay or Barren Grounds safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Barragga Bay has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Barren Grounds scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Barragga Bay scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Barren Grounds scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Barragga Bay or Barren Grounds?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Barragga Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
